{{Quote|All's arranged, Hosk. Pad 9. In an hour.|A M'shento'su'Nikto|<ref name="Leg2" />}}
'''Pad 9''' was a [[Hangar/Legends|landing pad]] on<ref name="Leg2" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="LECG">''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lok/Legends|Lok]] located within an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] of travel from the establishment<ref name="Leg2" /> [[Brogar's Safe House and Cantina]].<ref name="LECG" /> Around [[137 ABY]], a [[Unidentified M'shento'su'Nikto|M'shento'su'Nikto]] who owed the fugitive<ref name="Leg2" /> [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]<ref name="LECG" /> [[Hosk Trey'lis]] a favor arranged escape off of Lok for Trey'lis. The [[M'shento'su'Nikto|Nikto]] met with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] at Brogar's and told him to be at Pad 9 in one hour. Trey'lis never made it to Pad 9, however, as he was captured by a trio of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].<ref name="Leg2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Pad 9 was mentioned in the [[Legacy (2006) 2|second issue]] of the comic series ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]''. The issue was written by [[John Ostrander]] and [[Jan Duursema]] and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="Leg2" /> on [[July 11]], [[2006]].<ref name="Date">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54720/star_wars_legacy_2006_2|text=Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 2}}</ref>
